data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes). However, while the linked use case mentions fixed-duration appointments, there is no direct evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of such fixed-duration slots. The evidence primarily focuses on successful bookings without specifying the duration of those appointments, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of fixed-duration appointments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
